tracks.meaning: the part of a plant that grows downward into soil, absorbing water and nutrients
the basal or deepest part of a structure or organ in the body
the topmost directory or folder in a hierarchical file system from which all other directories branch
to establish the base or foundation for something; to originate or trace back to a source
the origin or earliest form of a word or linguistic element
a value that when multiplied by itself a specified number of times equals a given number
the underground part or base of a mineral deposit or ore body
the fundamental cause, source, or origin of a problem or situation
the legal basis or ground upon which a claim or action is founded
the fundamental note or tonal center of a chord or harmonic progression
